title: fagelia alba
intro: Fagelia alba, also known as the White Fagelia, is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fagelia alba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Fagelia alba, such as infusions and decoctions, are used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used as a natural remedy for digestive issues and skin problems.
